series_metadata.series_title: Permit Applications, Permit Processing Materials, Transfer Requests, Draft Permit Records
series_metadata.series_description: Documents include but are not limited to, the initial permit application, review comments, correspondence, support documents, revision to ODA forms, engineering drawings, Major Operational Change documents (MOC), Draft Permit Public Notice, Press Release (if applicable), Public Meeting Public Notice (if applicable), Public Meeting sign-in sheet, transcript and public comments (if applicable).

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep for six months after request for withdrawal of permit application or draft permit;or six months after issuance or denial of the Final Permit or transfer, unless an appeal of the decision is pending. In which case, keep until all appeals are complete then destroy. ; Electronic: Keep for six months after request for withdrawal of permit application or draft permit;or six months after issuance or denial of the Final Permit or transfer, unless an appeal of the decision is pending. In which case, keep until all appeals are complete then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
